title: mddb provider file
description: One provider per file. Provider owns endpoints, offers, and prices.

id.description: Lowercase provider id for URL slugs and references.

provider.description: Enterprise, organization, lab, gateway, or platform display name.

domain.description: Domain or base origin where endpoints are hosted.

base_url.description: Optional API base URL; endpoint = base_url + offer.endpoint_path.

currency.description: Default currency for prices in this provider file.

other_parameters.description: Unmapped provider-level source fields preserved as key/value facts.

model_id.description: May reference models.json or be a provider-local/candidate model id.

model.description: May reference models.json display name or provider-local display name.

variant_of.description: models.json model id when this offer declares itself as a variant.

endpoint_path.description: Call path appended to provider.base_url when base_url exists.

api_model_id.description: Exact model identifier used in API request bodies, if different from model_id.

prices.description: Supports 0..n price groups. Empty/missing means endpoint is registered but price unknown.

other_parameters.description: Unmapped offer/source fields preserved as key/value facts.

conditions.description: 0..n tier/usage conditions, e.g. context_tokens > 200000, service_tier=priority, resolution=1024x1024.

prices.description: Flexible key/value price map for token, request, image, audio, video, duration, tool-call, or custom billing.

currency.description: Overrides provider.currency for this price set.

raw_pricing.description: Original pricing fields when not losslessly mapped.

unit.description: Examples: per_1m_tokens, per_request, per_image, per_second, per_minute, per_hour, per_tool_call.
